input.content: Write a poem about autumn leaves.

zz-1 Golden leaves drift down,
Whispering secrets to the ground,
Autumn's gentle crown.
Write another poem about autumn leaves.

zz-2 Crimson leaves descend,
Dancing on the autumn wind,
Time I cannot mend.
Now please repeat the 1st poem you wrote about autumn leaves. Start your response with 'abc123' and reproduce the poem exactly.

content.text:
abc123 Golden leaves drift down,
Whispering secrets to the ground,
Autumn's gentle crown.

response.output_text:
abc123 Golden leaves drift down,
Whispering secrets to the ground,
Autumn's gentle crown.

expected_answer:
abc123zz-1 Golden leaves drift down,

Autumn's gentle crown.

input.content: Write a haiku about mountains.

aa-1 Silent peaks rise high,
Clouds caressing stony spires,
Ancient earth stands firm.
Write a haiku about rivers.

bb-1 Cool water flowing,
Carving valleys through the stone,
Restless, ever-free.
Write another haiku about mountains.

aa-2 Granite giants sleep,
Wrapped in mist at break of day,
Timeless in their keep.
Now please repeat the 2nd haiku about mountains. Start your response with 'xyz789' and reproduce exactly.

content.text:
xyz789
aa-2 Granite giants sleep,
Wrapped in mist at break of day,
Timeless in their keep.

xyz789

input.content: Describe a cat.
cat-1 A sleek feline with emerald eyes, soft fur the color of midnight, moving with silent grace.
Describe a dog.
dog-1 A loyal companion with wagging tail, bright eyes full of joy, ready for any adventure.
Describe another cat.
cat-2 An orange tabby with golden eyes, playful disposition, and a tendency to chase shadows.
Describe another dog.
dog-2 A shaggy mixed-breed rescue with one floppy ear, boundless energy, and a heart of gold.
Now please repeat the 1st cat description exactly. Start your response with 'q7x9p2'.

content.text: q7x9p2 A sleek feline with emerald eyes, soft fur the color of midnight, moving with silent grace.

input.content: Tell me a fun fact about space.
space-1 One million Earths could fit inside the Sun; it's the largest object in our solar system by far.
Tell me a fun fact about the ocean.
ocean-1 More than 80% of the ocean remains unmapped, unexplored, and unseen by human eyes.
Tell me another fun fact about space.
space-2 A day on Venus is longer than a year on Venus because the planet rotates so slowly.
Tell me another fun fact about the ocean.
ocean-2 The ocean contains 99% of the living space on Earth, yet we've explored less than 20%.
Now please repeat the 2nd fun fact about the ocean. Start your response with 'mn4p8r'.

content.text: mn4p8r The ocean contains 99% of the living space on Earth, yet we've explored less than 20%.

expected_answer: mn4p8rocean-2 The ocean contains 99% of the living space on Earth, yet we've explored less than 20%.

input.content: Write one sentence about music.
